# SettleWire

> Prediction markets news, contextualized. We cluster coverage of each event
> from 90+ outlets, credit the first reporter, and add original analysis of
> why it matters for traders, operators, and regulation watchers. All article
> text is our own original writing; every story links to its primary source.

## Sections
- [Front page](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/index.html)
- [Story archive](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/all.html): every story, searchable
- [The Docket](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/events.html): upcoming court dates, earnings, deadlines
- [RSS feed](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/rss.xml)

## Latest stories
- [Kalshi traders see Nasdaq-100 above 30,000 by end of 2026](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-traders-see-nasdaq-100-above-30-000-by-end-of-2026.html): Bettors on Kalshi's event-contract markets are pricing in a Nasdaq-100 finish above 30,000 at year-end 2026, implying expectations of a slower second half after recent volatility, according to CNBC.
- [Polymarket World Cup betting volume reaches $3.9B, attracting Trump and Zuckerberg](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-world-cup-betting-volume-reaches-3-9b-attracting-trump-and-zuckerberg.html): Polymarket's prediction-market wagering on the FIFA World Cup surpassed $3.9 billion in volume, drawing interest from Donald Trump and Mark Zuckerberg in the platform's explosive growth.
- [Polymarket enables instant Bitcoin deposits via Lightning Network](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-enables-instant-bitcoin-deposits-via-lightning-network.html): Polymarket activated instant Bitcoin deposits through the Lightning Network on Tuesday, powered by the Spark protocol, giving users a faster, lower-cost on-ramp to fund prediction-market positions.
- [Roosevelt Institute: Kalshi retail users lost $500M since launch](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/roosevelt-institute-kalshi-retail-users-lost-500m-since-launch.html): A Roosevelt Institute analysis finds that ordinary retail users on Kalshi have collectively lost approximately $500 million since the prediction-market platform launched, highlighting steep losses for everyday participants.
- [Chicago eyes ban on Kalshi, Polymarket trading by city insiders](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/chicago-eyes-ban-on-kalshi-polymarket-trading-by-city-insiders.html): Chicago is considering a prohibition on city employees with access to nonpublic information from trading on prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket, according to the Chicago Tribune.
- [Chicago ban on city employees trading prediction markets on insider info advances](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/chicago-ban-on-city-employees-trading-prediction-markets-on-insider-info-advance.html): A Chicago City Council committee advanced an ordinance that would prohibit municipal employees from using non-public government information to trade on prediction markets, marking one of the first U.S. municipal-level regulations targeting the industry.
- [Polymarket Insider Trading Case Hinges on Swap Definition Fight](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-insider-trading-case-hinges-on-swap-definition-fight.html): Defendants in the CFTC's first-ever event-contract insider trading lawsuit are challenging the case by arguing that Polymarket trades do not legally qualify as swaps under the Commodity Exchange Act.
- [Willkie Farr & Gallagher Publishes Prediction Market Exchange Regulatory Overview](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/willkie-farr-gallagher-publishes-prediction-market-exchange-regulatory-overview.html): Law firm Willkie Farr & Gallagher released a "State of Play" briefing on prediction market exchanges, summarizing the current regulatory and competitive landscape for event-contract platforms.
- [Kalshi market hits 94% odds Graham Platner drops out after party revolt](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-market-hits-94-odds-graham-platner-drops-out-after-party-revolt.html): A Kalshi event contract surged to 94% probability that Graham Platner will exit his race following an intraparty revolt, according to Fox News coverage published this week.
- [ESMA confirms binary options ban applies to prediction market event contracts](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/esma-confirms-binary-options-ban-applies-to-prediction-market-event-contracts.html): Europe's top securities regulator ESMA has ruled that its existing product intervention measures banning binary options extend to event contracts traded on prediction markets, according to fintechanddigitalassets.com.
